arts.ttl: Tottenham need to agree personal terms with Johnny Cardoso to trigger €25m clause
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur secured an option to buy Johnny Cardoso when they sold Giovani Lo Celso to Real Betis last summer. Cardoso has impressed this season and earlier this week, the La Liga club rewarded him with a new contract until 2030. arts.ttl: Preview: Celta Vigo vs. Real Betis - prediction, team news, lineups
